title: Orchestration
subtitle: Launch and orchestrate multi-agent runs — track each agent's work and status

tab.listEmpty: No runs yet — click “New run” above to start one

start.title: Kick off a multi-agent orchestration
start.subtitle: Describe the task in a sentence — the lead agent plans the task graph and assigns the best-fit agent to each step automatically.
start.label: New orchestration
start.placeholder: Describe the task you want orchestrated — the lead agent will plan it… (e.g. research three competitors and produce a comparison report with pros & cons)
start.advanced: Need a work dir, pinned roles or a precise model range? Structured new run

composer.title: New run
composer.subtitle: Describe the goal, pick the models and roles, and let a multi-agent fleet run it for you.
composer.goalPlaceholder: What should the fleet accomplish? Spell out the goal, scope and acceptance criteria…
composer.workDirHint: Optional · leave empty to use the default workspace
composer.modelRequired: Please select at least one model
composer.noModels: No usable model configured · add and enable a model in Model management first.

model.autoHint: Will use all {{count}} enabled model(s), one member synthesized per model.

composer.rolesHint: Optional · leave empty to let the fleet assemble itself

autonomy.interactiveHint: The fleet pauses after planning and waits for your approval before executing.
autonomy.supervisedHint: Executes automatically once approved — you can still step in.

composer.replanSubtitle: Edit the goal, models, roles or autonomy and re-decompose the task graph. The old plan (tasks, assignments) is cleared and rebuilt.

run.title: Run History
run.subtitle: Browse every orchestration run you started — click any one to replay its task graph
run.emptyDesc: Give a multi-agent team a goal inside a conversation to start a run — it will show up here for review afterwards.

manage.deleteConfirm: Delete this run? Its task graph and execution records are removed too.

mobile.noTasks: The fleet is breaking the goal into tasks — they will appear here shortly.

detail.cancelConfirm: Stop this run? Tasks still executing will be cancelled.
detail.planningDesc: The fleet is breaking the goal into a task graph — nodes will appear shortly.

assign.reassignThenRerun: Model changed; this node already ran — hit 重跑 (Rerun) to re-run it on the new model
assign.lockedHint: When locked, the orchestrator won't auto-reassign this task on the next planning pass.

spec.title: Intent / prompt
spec.placeholder: Describe what this node should do…
spec.dirtyHint: Click Rerun after saving to apply the new intent.
spec.runningHint: Task is running — pause it to edit.

rerun.running: Task is running — pause it first
rerun.confirm: Rerun will reset this node and its downstream, then re-execute. Continue?

preconfig.title: Pre-start config
preconfig.subtitlePending: Pick a model and pre-inject requirements; applied when the node starts
preconfig.subtitleSettled: Adjust this node's model & requirements; takes effect on rerun
preconfig.noModels: No models available — configure a provider under Models first.
preconfig.modelHint: Any configured model — not limited to the pool chosen when this run was created.
preconfig.presetPlaceholder: Extra requirements/preferences this node must follow (appended to the node's input, separate from the task description).
preconfig.footerPending: Applied automatically when this node starts
preconfig.footerSettled: After saving, click 重跑 at the top to rerun with the new config
preconfig.savedPending: Saved — applied when the node starts
preconfig.savedRerun: Saved; this node already ran — click 重跑 to rerun with the new config

transcript.noConversation: There’s no transcript to show — it will appear here once a worker picks up this task.

steer.label: Local adjustment
steer.placeholder: Describe a local adjustment for this node…

intent.label: Adjust orchestration
intent.placeholder: Describe how you'd like the orchestration changed (e.g. research is too shallow, add a verify pass and a second researcher)

header.rename: Click to rename the orchestration goal

view.conversationHint: See the lead agent's orchestration decisions and your adjustment dialogue

feed.decisionIntro: I broke the goal down into the orchestration below and assigned the best-fit agent to each task:
feed.intentReply: Re-adjusted the orchestration per your intent: kept {{kept}} · added {{added}} · removed {{removed}}.
feed.empty: The fleet is forming its orchestration decision — the lead agent's breakdown and assignments will appear here shortly.

precipitate.title: Save roles as assistants
precipitate.subtitle: {{count}} role(s) from this run can be saved as assistants for reuse
precipitate.exists: An assistant with this name already exists
